versions.version_description: They were chords, no tabs, sorry (the tabs are extra).

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Everybody Wants To Rule The World
That Look You Give That Guy
Waiting For The Moon To Rise

content:
TABBED BY: SANDROK71@YAHOO.COM

[ch]Aadd9[/ch]  x02420


[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
       I wanted to be with you alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
       and talk about the weather[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Aadd9[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
But traditions I can trace against the child in your face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
      Won't escape my attention[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
You keep your distance with a system of touch[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
       and gentle persuasion[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I'm lost in admiration could I need you this much?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Oh you're wasting my time, you're just, just, just wasting time[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
Something happens and I'm head over heels[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
I never find out 'til I'm head over heels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
Something happens and I'm head over heels[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Ah, don't take my heart, don't break my heart[/tab]
 N.C.
Don't, don't, don't throw it away
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
          throw it away,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
          throw it away![/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
      I made a fire, I'm watching it burn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
  Yeah! Thought of your future[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Aadd9[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
With one foot in the past, now just how long will it last[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Aadd9[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
No, no, no have you no ambition[/tab]
                                 (What's the matter with my)
[tab]   [ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
My mother and my brothers used to breathing clean air[/tab]
                              (Nothing ever changes when you're acting your age)
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
       and dreaming I'm a doctor[/tab]
                        (Nothing gets done when you feel like a baby)
[tab]     [ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
It's hard to be a man when there's a gun in your hand[/tab]
                                  (Nothing ever changes when you're acting your age)
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, I   feel   so - oh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
Something happens and I'm head over heels[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
I never find out 'til I'm head over heels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
Something happens and I'm head over heels[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Ah, don't take my heart, don't break my heart[/tab]
 N.C.
Don't, don't, don't throw it away

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
      This is my four leaf clover[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
I'm on the line, one open mind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
This is my four leaf clover[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
La, la la la, la,  La la la la, la,   La, la, La, la, La la[/tab]

La, la la la, la,  La la la la, la,   La, la, La, la, La la[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
La, la la la, la,  La la la la, la,   La, la, La, la, La la[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
La, la la la, la,  La la la la, la,   La, la, La, la, La la[/tab]
                                In my  minds's eye
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                           [ch]D[/ch]
La, la la la, la,  La la la la, la[/tab]
One little boy, one little man, funny how        time flies
